short_description.value: MTP (Multi-Task Pretraining) is a remote sensing foundation model paradigm that uses a shared encoder and task-specific decoders for multi-task supervised pretraining on the SAMRS dataset, covering semantic segmentation, instance segmentation, and rotated object detection. It supports both CNN and vision transformer backbones with over 300M parameters and demonstrates state-of-the-art performance across 14 remote sensing benchmarks.

pretraining.value: Stage-wise multi-task supervised pretraining on SAMRS dataset with semantic segmentation, instance segmentation, and rotated object detection tasks using a shared encoder and task-specific decoders.

value.value: RVSA: Rotated Varied-Size window Attention for ViT

dataset.value: SAMRS (Segment Anything Model annotated Remote Sensing Segmentation dataset)

application.value: Land use and land cover classification
